title: Pulse-sticker
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''pulse-sticker''' was a sticker that glowed rhythmically.

At [[Republic Mobile Surgical Unit/Legends|Rimsoo]] units, [[Doctor/Legends|doctors]] and nurses attached pulse-stickers to patients during triage to categorize the severity of patients injuries and their chances of survival. The stickers were numbered from 1 to 6 as well as a red "X" sticker attached to patients who had virtually no chance of survival and were deemed untreatable.

Rimsoo units also used pulse-stickers of various colors on patients beds to help organize them.

==Appearances==
*''[[MedStar I: Battle Surgeons]]'' {{1st}}
